'''chobavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubberish|rubberish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubberish|rubberish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chobavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobavithi|chobavithi]] || [[word:chobaviji|chobaviji]] || [[word:chobavishi|chobavishi]] || [[word:chobaviki|chobaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobavuthuthu|chobavuthuthu]] || [[word:chobavujuju|chobavujuju]] || [[word:chobavushushu|chobavushushu]] || [[word:chobavukuku|chobavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobavuthu|chobavuthu]] || [[word:chobavuju|chobavuju]] || [[word:chobavushu|chobavushu]] || [[word:chobavuku|chobavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobavufthuf|chobavufthuf]] || [[word:chobavufjuf|chobavufjuf]] || [[word:chobavufshuf|chobavufshuf]] || [[word:chobavufkuf|chobavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobavethe|chobavethe]] || [[word:chobaveje|chobaveje]] || [[word:chobaveshe|chobaveshe]] || [[word:chobaveke|chobaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobavothotho|chobavothotho]] || [[word:chobavojojo|chobavojojo]] || [[word:chobavoshosho|chobavoshosho]] || [[word:chobavokoko|chobavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobavotho|chobavotho]] || [[word:chobavojo|chobavojo]] || [[word:chobavosho|chobavosho]] || [[word:chobavoko|chobavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobavofthof|chobavofthof]] || [[word:chobavofjof|chobavofjof]] || [[word:chobavofshof|chobavofshof]] || [[word:chobavofkof|chobavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfthĂŻf|chobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfjĂŻf|chobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfshĂŻf|chobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfkĂŻf|chobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|chobavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|chobavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|chobavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|chobavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfthĂŻf|chobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfjĂŻf|chobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfshĂŻf|chobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfkĂŻf|chobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfthĂŻf|chobavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfjĂŻf|chobavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfshĂŻf|chobavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:chobavĂŻfkĂŻf|chobavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chobavĂŠthĂŠ|chobavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:chobavĂŠjĂŠ|chobavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:chobavĂŠshĂŠ|chobavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:chobavĂŠkĂŠ|chobavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chobavathatha|chobavathatha]] || [[word:chobavajaja|chobavajaja]] || [[word:chobavashasha|chobavashasha]] || [[word:chobavakaka|chobavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chobavatha|chobavatha]] || [[word:chobavaja|chobavaja]] || [[word:chobavasha|chobavasha]] || [[word:chobavaka|chobavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chobavafthaf|chobavafthaf]] || [[word:chobavafjaf|chobavafjaf]] || [[word:chobavafshaf|chobavafshaf]] || [[word:chobavafkaf|chobavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:chobavasha|chobavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobavshĂ«sha|chobavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobavrosha|chobavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobavmusha|chobavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobavyasha|chobavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobavnkshĂ«sha|gochobavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobavnkrosha|gochobavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobavnkmusha|gochobavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobavnkyasha|gochobavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:chobabavasha|chobabavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobabavshĂ«sha|chobabavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobabavrosha|chobabavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobabavmusha|chobabavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobabavyasha|chobabavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobabavnkshĂ«sha|gochobabavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobabavnkrosha|gochobabavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobabavnkmusha|gochobabavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobabavnkyasha|gochobabavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:chebĂŠvasha|chebĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chebĂŠvshĂ«sha|chebĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chebĂŠvrosha|chebĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chebĂŠvmusha|chebĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chebĂŠvyasha|chebĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochebĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gochebĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochebĂŠvnkrosha|gochebĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochebĂŠvnkmusha|gochebĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochebĂŠvnkyasha|gochebĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:chobfavasha|chobfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:chobfavshĂ«sha|chobfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:chobfavrosha|chobfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:chobfavmusha|chobfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:chobfavyasha|chobfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochobfavnkshĂ«sha|gochobfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gochobfavnkrosha|gochobfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochobfavnkmusha|gochobfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gochobfavnkyasha|gochobfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
